welcome.title: Welcome to Smart Panel
welcome.description: Let's set up your smart home. This wizard will guide you through the initial configuration.

steps.locationDescription: Configure your location for weather data
steps.spacesDescription: Add rooms and areas to organize your devices
steps.finishDescription: Your smart panel is ready to go

account.description: Create your administrator account. This will be the owner of the smart panel.
account.created: Account created successfully! You are now logged in.

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address

messages.created: Your account has been created and you are now logged in.
messages.error: Failed to create account. Please try again.

location.description: Set your location for weather information and other location-based features. You can skip this step and configure it later.

placeholders.citySearch: Type a city name to search...

location.hint: You can configure your location later in the Weather settings.

messages.geolocationNotSupported: Geolocation is not supported by your browser.
messages.geolocationDenied: Location access was denied. Please allow location access in your browser settings.
messages.geolocationTimeout: Location request timed out. Please try again.
messages.geolocationError: An error occurred while getting your location.

spaces.description: Create rooms and areas to organize your devices. You can add more spaces later.
spaces.hint: You can add, rename, or reorganize spaces later in the Spaces settings.

integrations.description: Enable device integrations to connect your smart home platforms. You can configure connection details later.
integrations.hint: You can enable or disable integrations later in the Extensions settings.

complete.title: You're All Set!
complete.description: Your Smart Panel is configured and ready to use. You can now start adding devices, creating spaces, and customizing your dashboard.

summary.locationSkipped: Weather location skipped (can be configured later)
summary.spacesCreated: {count} room(s) will be created | {count} room will be created | {count} rooms will be created
summary.spacesSkipped: No rooms added (can be created later)
summary.integrationsEnabled: {count} integration(s) enabled | {count} integration enabled | {count} integrations enabled
summary.integrationsSkipped: No integrations enabled (can be configured later)

messages.finished: Setup complete! Welcome to Smart Panel.
